facebook.caption:
POV: you walk down Hoàng Văn Thụ and find 58 CAFÉ before the crowds do.

4.6 stars. 123 reviews. A local coffee stop that doesn't scream tourist trap.

Order something cold. Sit down. Let Phu Quoc slow you for an hour.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Spotted on Hoàng Văn Thụ. 58 CAFÉ. 4.6 stars from 123 reviewers and almost zero foot traffic when we rolled up. This is the kind of stop that fixes a packed itinerary.
